athlete_1_coach.title: Advanced Strength Building Program
athlete_1_coach.description: A comprehensive 8-week program designed to build strength, improve form, and increase endurance. This plan focuses on progressive overload and proper technique.
athlete_1_coach.goals: Increase squat strength by 30%, improve deadlift form, build upper body strength, and enhance core stability. Focus on progressive overload and proper recovery.
